summary: ISS-1147 tracks EXP-183 E_PRIMARY schema-extension deferred work. EXP-397 explains why the original schema can no longer be cleanly implemented (dome claim_index.json refactored — entries to claims, removed strict_prospective_confirmed, registry_status to status; 2 of 5 proposed fields no longer have source data), patches three false prose claims in Section 4.6 (which had been promising per-WIN author_* fields that do not exist), and adds a 9-row mirror sub-table inside Section 4.6 instead of carrying 60+ null-default fields on WIN rows. Audit-monitor property preserved with leaner update path. Recommend close as superseded, not fixed. Tests must run before commit per CLAUDE.md.
patches_summary: 4 find-and-replace operations on data/sections.json:part4.html: P1 corrects per-WIN-cards prose, P2 corrects Our-WIN-cards-now-carry prose, P3 corrects footer See-also, P4 inserts new Currently-classified-claims sub-table before Kernel-of-truth h3. All four anchors verified unique in part4.html and simulated-apply confirmed clean.
out_of_scope_notes: EXP-397 flags two follow-ups for tinker: (a) integrity rule to catch prose-referencing-nonexistent-data-fields (the false WIN cards now carry author_claim_class line sat in production ~28 days); (b) poller wiring to diff dome api/current/claim_index.json against this new sub-table on each refresh.
